name: Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition
license: CC-BY-4.0 (D&D 5.1 SRD), Wizards of the Coast
summary: The classic d20 system. One die, plus an attribute modifier, plus proficiency if trained, against a fixed Difficulty Class. Mirrors Marinara Engine's existing Game Mode default.

Very Easy.description: Trivial; only roll if a fail is interesting.

Easy.description: An untrained adult can manage on a good day.

Medium.description: A trained character expects to succeed.

Hard.description: A trained character with a good attribute may still fail.

Very Hard.description: Possible only with high attribute and proficiency, or magic.

attributes.name: Strength
attributes.description: Raw physical power, athletic training, the extent to which you can exert raw physical force.

attributes.name: Intelligence
attributes.description: Mental acuity, accuracy of recall, ability to reason.

attributes.name: Wisdom
attributes.description: Awareness, intuition, insight, attunement to surroundings.

attributes.name: Level
attributes.description: Character level. Drives Proficiency Bonus per the 5e progression table (+2 at 1-4, +3 at 5-8, +4 at 9-12, +5 at 13-16, +6 at 17-20). Update Proficiency Bonus manually when crossing a tier.

derivedStats.name: Hit Points
derivedStats.formula: (class hit die avg) + CON_mod, per level

values.label: Blinded
values.description: Auto-fail sight checks; attacks against have advantage; your attacks have disadvantage.

values.label: Charmed
values.description: Cannot attack the charmer or target them with harmful effects.

values.label: Frightened
values.description: Disadvantage on checks/attacks while source is in line of sight; cannot move closer.

values.label: Grappled
values.description: Speed becomes 0; ends if grappler is incapacitated or you escape.

values.label: Invisible
values.description: Heavily obscured; attacks against have disadvantage; your attacks have advantage.

values.label: Paralyzed
values.description: Incapacitated, cannot move or speak; auto-fail STR/DEX saves; attacks against have advantage and crit at melee range.

values.label: Petrified
values.description: Transformed to stone; resistance to all damage; immune to poison/disease.

values.label: Poisoned
values.description: Disadvantage on attacks and ability checks.

values.label: Prone
values.description: Crawl-only movement; disadvantage on attacks; melee attacks against have advantage, ranged attacks have disadvantage.

values.label: Restrained
values.description: Speed 0; disadvantage on attacks and DEX saves; attacks against have advantage.

values.label: Stunned
values.description: Incapacitated; auto-fail STR and DEX saves; attacks against have advantage.

values.label: Unconscious
values.description: Incapacitated and prone; auto-fail STR/DEX saves; attacks within 5 ft auto-crit.
